metadata.title: Auto Embed
metadata.description: Helps to embed links using markdown instead of iframe

regex.source: .log("No enabled websites setting found. Adding all")
regex.target: .log("未找到启用的网站设置。正在添加所有")
.error("解析 reddit 消息时出错。错误: " + e2)

regex.source: .error(`Command "Auto Embed: Mark to embed" is available even when there isn't any selection`)
regex.target: .error(`命令 "自动嵌入: 标记为嵌入" 在没有选择时也可用`)

regex.source: .setDesc("If the website has an option for it, sets the default theme for embeds.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果网站有此选项，则设置嵌入的默认主题.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose how the embed behaves before loading.")
.setDesc("If you are pasting a link, suggest to embed it.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果您粘贴链接，建议嵌入它.")

regex.source: .setDesc("YouTube & Twitter/X is supported by Obsidian natively so it's off by default.")
regex.target: .setDesc("YouTube 和 Twitter/X 被 Obsidian 原生支持，因此默认关闭.")

regex.source: .setDesc('Note that when the view options is set to editable, the default page width is too small. Try to use "Preview" where possible')
regex.target: .setDesc('请注意，当视图选项设置为可编辑时，默认页面宽度太小。尽可能使用 "预览"')

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose what the plugin does when the link isn't supported")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择插件在链接不被支持时的行为")

regex.source: .setDesc("Default is 100%, filling the width of the viewport")
.setDesc("Default is 500px. Set to 100vh if u want it to be the height of the viewport")
regex.target: .setDesc("默认是 500px。如果想要高度为视口高度，请设置为 100vh")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically fetches and displays the title below the embed when a custom title isn\u2019t set")
regex.target: .setDesc("当未设置自定义标题时，自动获取并显示嵌入下方的标题")
.appendText("预览 - 不可编辑，仅嵌入内容")

regex.source: .appendText("Edit minimal - Editable but don't show the header and toolbar")
regex.target: .appendText("最小编辑 - 可编辑，但不显示标题和工具栏")

regex.source: .appendText("Edit default - Editable and shows the header and toolbar")
regex.target: .appendText("默认编辑 - 可编辑并显示标题和工具栏")

regex.source: .appendText("Default text when 'Auto link title' is false OR no title is found.")
regex.target: .appendText("当 '自动链接标题' 为假或未找到标题时的默认文本.")

regex.source: .appendText("Set 'Auto link title' to false and clear 'Default title' to remove the link.")
regex.target: .appendText("将 '自动链接标题' 设置为假并清除 '默认标题' 以移除链接.")

regex.source: .appendText("Reload any opened note to apply changes")
regex.target: .appendText("重新加载任何打开的笔记以应用更改")

regex.source: .appendText("Found bugs, have a website to embed, or want a feature?")
regex.target: .appendText("发现错误，想嵌入网站或需要某个功能吗?")
